name: list_records
description: Retrieve records from a specific table in an Airtable base. Supports filtering with Airtable formulas, sorting by fields, selecting specific fields to return, and pagination via offsets. Returns up to 100 records per page.

parameters.name: baseId
parameters.description: The ID of the base containing the table (starts with 'app').

parameters.name: tableIdOrName
parameters.description: The ID or URL-encoded name of the table to list records from.

parameters.name: fields[]
parameters.description: Only return data for the specified field names or IDs. Pass multiple times for multiple fields.

parameters.name: filterByFormula
parameters.description: An Airtable formula to filter records. Only records where the formula evaluates to true are returned.

parameters.name: maxRecords
parameters.description: The maximum total number of records to return across all pages.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of records per page (max 100).

parameters.name: sort[0][field]
parameters.description: The field name or ID to sort by.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Pagination offset returned from a previous request. Pass this to get the next page of results.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: The name or ID of a view to use. Records will be filtered and sorted according to the view.
